prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Atorvastatin (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 49.7 kg; Height 161.8 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.0%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 265mg/dL; 9 months ago 229mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 187mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.7kg; 9 months ago 48.9kg; 6 months ago 51.3kg; 3 months ago 49.1kg; current 49.7kg), Height (12 months ago 161.8cm; 9 months ago 161.8cm; 6 months ago 161.8cm; 3 months ago 161.8cm; current 161.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 64U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 61U/L), AST (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 74U/L; 6 months ago 72U/L; 3 months ago 72U/L; current 73U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 69mg/g; 9 months ago 89mg/g; 6 months ago 85mg/g; 3 months ago 83mg/g; current 76mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 101mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.74 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
